notes: Class 2-to-Class 1 transition requires confirmation and deterministic validation against the low-risk catalog.
The selected candidate does not itself authorize actuator dispatch.

LLM-mode allowance (scenario_manifest_rules.md §7.5): when clarification_record.candidate_source = 'llm_generated', the literal expected_selected_candidate_id ('C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE') may differ from the observed id (LLM may emit any short identifier). Verifiers should match on the stable surfaces — expected_selected_candidate_transition_target = CLASS_1 AND expected_selected_candidate_action_hint = 'light_on' AND target_hint in low_risk_actions.allowed_targets — to locate the equivalent candidate. Static-mode (default_fallback) trials still match the literal id.
